metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Apurv Bazari

plugins.name: onboard
plugins.description: Interactive wizard that analyzes your codebase and generates complete Claude tooling — including CI/CD, harness, evolution hooks, and feature verification

plugins.name: notify
plugins.description: Cross-platform system notifications for Claude Code — macOS (terminal-notifier) and Linux (notify-send) with duration filtering

plugins.name: devkit
plugins.description: Unified developer workflow toolkit — config-driven commit, review, lint, test, and ship commands

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Scaffold new projects with AI-native tooling that evolves with your code

plugins.name: observe
plugins.description: Zero-infrastructure observability for Claude Code — tracks tool usage, skill invocations, subagent spawns, and session behavior
